programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: Expert house flipper James Dainard and his team partner with brother-sister newbie flippers Blake and Abby on a risky zombie house project; James funds the renovation, while the siblings manage the contractors and oversee the work.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard butts heads when the competition, fellow flipper Rob, brings him a potential project: a split-level property with a massive yard in a prime neighborhood; Rob's short on funds and full of confidence.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard and his team connect with Tyler, a first-time flipper with a lead on a zombie house they'll need to renovate from top to bottom; but entrusting such a big job to a newbie makes them question whether he can execute the plan on time.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: A massive zombie home with a terrible layout and a rotting pool house in the backyard; Andy's stubbornness becomes a problem; James struggles to decide if Andy's attitude and the challenging pool house will make or break the deal.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard takes on his toughest challenge yet; when his team finds a hoarder's nightmare with rotting walls, a sketchy layout and a collapsing roof, James is excited by the challenge.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Garland, Texas, Flash Shelton and his team help a family repossess their deceased brother's home from a squatter who moved in on the day that their brother died.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash Shelton and his team head to Vancouver, Washington to help a homeowner after a house sitter overstays her welcome and becomes an unwanted squatter; when Flash's team attempts to reclaim the home by using surveillance cameras, megaphones and even snakes, the confrontation turns into a tense standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: The team head to Conroe, Texas, to help a grieving family reclaim their late grandmother's home from a squatter couple who moved in after her passing; tensions run high when the couple resists leaving.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Cle Elum, Washington, Casey lost her dream home to a stranger who claimed it as her own for over 4 months and even tried to rent rooms out to other people for profit; but when Flash and his team move in, will their tactics be enough for this squatter to finally leave once and for all?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The heat is brutal in Riverside, but thankfully, Dusty & Lupe find a way to get soaked; Brandi manages to dig up some "grana"; Lisa goes camping in an unexpected way, while Dave has to settle for a whole lot of not much.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The city of Hemet reminds Kenny of a certain English poet, but he ends up focusing on the Eastern arts; Ivy spreads holiday joy as he battles it out with a new buyer who isn't all that intimidated.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In West Covina, Dusty uses magic to find his treasure; Lisa, determined to make her carpenter father proud, looks for something to refurbish and ends up channeling something else; Ivy wrestles with heels and tools, while Brandi gets in the ring to honor her grandpa.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Bathed in the heat of Moreno Valley, Kenny has difficulty with names, so he calls an audible; Brandi can't catch a break without some help from above; Dave gets stuck with the business end of an unsatisfying locker; Dusty and Lupe put their "street" smarts to good use.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Back in Montebello, Kenny is determined to stop swearing by carrying around a cuss counter; Dave goes in big on a high-end locker; Ivy doesn't hit the bullseye when it counts; Dusty and Lupe hope to hear the pristine sounds of success.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Lisa keeps getting her lockers taken from her, and it makes her hopping mad; Kenny goes in for a banjo but comes out with a harmonica; Dusty and Lupe find the locker of her dreams; Ivy finds a vehicle in his locker, just not the one he expected.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers return to Moreno Valley, where an old friend surprises them; Dusty & Lupe do their best to hit it out of the park; Ivy finds a couple of "less scary" coffins; Brandi isn't going to let anything ruin her bright and sunny attitude.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: All the buyers are excited about the upscale potential of Rancho Palos Verdes, but it's Dave who finds his loot there; Brandi racks up a decent profit while saving herself from having to shell out for shelving; in Garden Grove, Kerri keeps Lisa focused long enough to weave a profit, while Kenny faces his fears in a new way.
